# Mehrdad Zaker

> Mehrdad Zaker is a private AI consulting and technical advisory practice focused on production-grade AI systems, private deployments, retrieval-backed workflows, and robotics-adjacent automation.

Use this file as a concise guide to the public site. The primary value of the website is technical positioning, service descriptions, IDX product context, selected writing, and ways to contact the practice about a concrete workflow or deployment problem.

The public website does not host the live authenticated IDX product experience. Public product guidance lives on the marketing site, while the live IDX portal and sign-in flow live on the IDX product host.

## Primary Services

- [Homepage](https://www.mehrdadzaker.com/): Overview of the consulting practice, delivery model, and main solution areas.
- [Solutions](https://www.mehrdadzaker.com/ai-robotics-solutions/): Starting point across AI systems, private deployment, and robotics-related solution areas.
- [Private AI Deployment](https://www.mehrdadzaker.com/private-ai-deployment/): Guidance for security-sensitive, private, and hybrid AI system deployment.
- [Custom AI Systems](https://www.mehrdadzaker.com/custom-ai-systems/): Delivery approach for workflow-specific AI systems, assistants, and automation.

## Robotics And IDX

- [Industrial Robotics](https://www.mehrdadzaker.com/robotics/industrial-robotics/): Factory and operations automation positioning.
- [Autonomous Systems](https://www.mehrdadzaker.com/robotics/autonomous-systems/): Applied autonomy positioning for real-world systems.
- [AI-Powered Robotics](https://www.mehrdadzaker.com/robotics/ai-powered-robotics/): Robotics platforms enhanced by AI, perception, and higher-level decision support.
- [IDX Overview](https://www.mehrdadzaker.com/idx/assistant/): Public overview of the IDX document workflow product and how it fits into source-grounded review.
- [IDX Dashboard Handoff](https://www.mehrdadzaker.com/idx/dashboard/): Redirect entry point into the live IDX product host.

## Writing And Contact

- [Newsletter](https://www.mehrdadzaker.com/newsletter/): Long-form notes on AI systems, robotics, and production architecture.
- [Newsletter Archive](https://www.mehrdadzaker.com/newsletter/archive/): Index of published newsletter entries.
- [Podcast](https://www.mehrdadzaker.com/podcast/): Applied AI and systems-oriented audio content.
- [Contact](https://www.mehrdadzaker.com/contact/): Best page for reaching out with a concrete deployment, workflow, or advisory need.

## Optional

- [About](https://www.mehrdadzaker.com/about/): Background on research, systems perspective, and prior experience.
- [Resources](https://www.mehrdadzaker.com/resources/): Supplemental public resources and references.
